  • Constructor Details

    • XboxController1038

      public XboxController1038(int port)
      Creates a new Xbox joystick object
      Parameters:
      port - USB port the joystick should be in

    • deadband

      public double deadband(double value)
      Returns the joystick axis value or 0 if less than deadband
      Returns:
      value of input axis, after deadband

    • getLeftY

      public double getLeftY()
      Returns the state of the left joystick on its vertical axis
      Overrides:
      getLeftY in class edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController
      Returns:
      value of the left joystick vertical axis, inverted so positive values are joystick up

    • getLeftX

      public double getLeftX()
      Returns the state of the left joystick on its horizontal axis
      Overrides:
      getLeftX in class edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController
      Returns:
      value of the left joystick horizontal axis

    • getRightY

      public double getRightY()
      Returns the state of the right joystick on its vertical axis
      Overrides:
      getRightY in class edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController
      Returns:
      value of the right joystick vertical axis, inverted so positive values are joystick up

    • getRightX

      public double getRightX()
      Returns the state of the right joystick on its horizontal axis
      Overrides:
      getRightX in class edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController
      Returns:
      value of the right joystick horizontal axis

    • setLeftRumble

      public void setLeftRumble(double speed)
      Sets the left rumble speed
      Parameters:
      speed - the rumble speed between 0.0 and 1.0

    • setRightRumble

      public void setRightRumble(double speed)
      Sets the right rumble speed
      Parameters:
      speed - the rumble speed between 0.0 and 1.0

    • setRumble

      public void setRumble(double speed)
      Sets both rumble motors to the same speed.
      Parameters:
      speed - the rumble speed between 0.0 and 1.0
